conversation.message_text: BÉIS Travel: Welcome to BÉIS Travel! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

BÉIS Travel: Oh hey, welcome back! Signing up for texts gives you exclusive early access to product drops, promotions and more. As a thank you, enjoy 20% Off your order with code WELCOMEgrfSuB 

Shop Now: beistravel.attn.tv/a5qaPETAU-zz .
BÉIS Travel: Bags designed to make your every day easier. Save our contact to make getting all of our latest updates easy.
BÉIS Travel: Looks like you almost bagged the perfect find. Don't let it slip away-check out now! beistravel.attn.tv/atyMmViOieXK .
BÉIS Travel: Hi there. If you need additional help please reach us at hello@beistravel.com. Text STOP to opt out.
My discount is not working

BÉIS Travel: I'm so sorry to hear that the discount is not working! Could you send me a screenshot of the error message you're getting along with the items in your cart? I'll be more than happy to check this for you.

You can also check out our promo details here: https://beistravel.attn.tv/aNs3IDMbe4nj
I tried to add a different item and it says the same thing

BÉIS Travel: Thank you for the screenshot. I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Upon checking, you have ordered from us before. Just to make sure, have you signed up for text or email alerts before? If so, our system is set up to give the same promo you previously received, which might be why that code isn't working. Please let me know if you need further assistance.
I have not signed up for text or email alerts before

BÉIS Travel: Thanks for getting back! I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. This definitely isn't the experience that we wanted you to have! Upon checking, the code is only applicable for your first order. Since you already purchased in the past. I'm afraid you're no longer eligible for the code. Not worry! Our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out! In the meantime, you can check out our sales collection here: https://beistravel.attn.tv/auZpj9pqxOoI

conversation.message_text: State Line Tack: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from State Line Tack.
State Line Tack: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
State Line Tack: Hey, this is Sarah! Thanks for signing up! Click here to activate your offer: slt.attn.tv/attQsCPsnljT
State Line Tack: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

State Line Tack: Hey, this is Sarah. Thanks for checking out our site! https://slt.attn.tv/atQI79XlwSLk

Are you looking for anything in particular today?
I'm on your website. Thank you;)
Manure replacement heads
State Line Tack: We have several Manure and Bedding Fork Replacement Heads available. Check them out here: https://slt.attn.tv/ald1qm7YEcJh
That's what I'm looking at. Can you give me a better price than what I see on website?
State Line Tack: Prices listed on our website are the most current. We do offer price matching. Details here: statelinetack.com
Do you have a discount code I can use?
State Line Tack: You can use the coupon code GPTXSLT on your purchase at statelinetack.com. Enjoy shopping!
Thank you!

Something went wrong with my order online. Kept saying it's calculating tax. I closed the site after 1/2 hour or so. I haven't received an email confirmation either. I hesitate ordering again. Please advise when you're able.

State Line Tack: I appreciate you bringing this to my attention! I apologize for the inconvenience. Could you please check if you received a confirmation email or if there's a charge on your account? Sometimes the email might arrive in your spam or promo folder, so be sure to take a look there too!
Looking
State Line Tack: Thanks for keeping me posted! Let me know how it goes!
Not in spam/junk
Pending on my account is a charge from yesterday.

State Line Tack: Thanks for getting back and for that information! If you didn't receive a confirmation email, your order may not have gone through. If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully. If it's refunded, you can try placing the order again. If it processes, you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
I guess it wasn't meant to be.
You're not following me. I placed the order this afternoon. The pending is not the order placed with StateLineTack this afternoon.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items
